channel.title: GDACS RSS information
channel.description: Near real-time notification about natural disaster with a potential humanitarian impact

item.title: Green flood alert in Türkiye
item.description: On 28/06/2026, a flood started in Türkiye, lasting until 30/06/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 0 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 0

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright notice: European Union (CC BY 4.0), reuse is allowed, provided appropriate credit to GDACS is given.

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:10km) in Balleny Islands Region 05/06/2026 20:58 UTC, [unknown].
item.description: On 6/5/2026 8:58:09 PM, an earthquake occurred in Balleny Islands Region potentially affecting [unknown]. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:10km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:10km

item.description: On 04/06/2026, a forest fire started in Australia, until 04/06/2026.

item.gdacs:severity: Green impact for forestfire in 5885 ha

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km) in United States 03/06/2026 10:53 UTC, 10 thousand in MMI IV.
item.description: On 6/3/2026 10:53:52 AM, an earthquake occurred in United States potentially affecting 10 thousand in MMI IV. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone AMANDA-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm).
item.description: From 02/06/2026 to 06/06/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 74 km/h) AMANDA-26 was active in EastPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: [unknown] (vulnerability [unknown]). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in tropical storm).
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 65 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm)

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone JANGMI-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 1.274 million .
item.description: From 27/05/2026 to 03/06/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 139 km/h) JANGMI-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Japan (vulnerability Low). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 1.274 million .
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 93 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 1.274 million
